zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Barrett於大約1657年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，她的父親James Barrett18歲，母親Mary White18歲。她和Phillip Perry至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1734年8月在她的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Barrett于大约1657年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，她的父亲James Barrett18岁，母亲Mary White18岁。她和Phillip Perry至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1734年8月在她的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Barrett was born about 1657, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Barrett, was 18 and her mother, Mary White, was 18. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Phillip Perry. She died in August 1734, in her hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Barrett est née environ 1657, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Barrett, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mary White, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Phillip Perry. Elle est décédée en août 1734, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Barrett um 1657 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Barrett 18 und ihre Mutter Mary White 18. Sie hatte mit Phillip Perry mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1734 im Alter von 78 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Barrett è nata il circa 1657 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Barrett, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mary White, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Phillip Perry. Morì nel agosto 1734, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Barrettが約1657年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父James Barrettは18歳，母Mary Whiteは18歳であった。彼女はPhillip Perryとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1734年8月に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Barrett(이)가 대략 1657년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Barrett(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary White(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Phillip Perry(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1734년 8월 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Barrett nasceu aproximadamente 1657, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Barrett, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mary White, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Phillip Perry. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1734, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Barrett родилась около 1657 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Barrett было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary White, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Phillip Perry. Она умерла август 1734 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Barrett nació aproximadamente 1657, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Barrett, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mary White, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Phillip Perry. Murió en agosto de 1734, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
